title: Change of venue; recusation of judge
doc_html:
§1645.  Change of venue; recusation of judge

No change of venue shall be allowed in any proceeding required under the provision of this Part to be brought before the district court.  The judge may be recused and a judge ad hoc appointed as is now provided by law in civil matters in this state.
doc_text:
§1645.  Change of venue; recusation of judge
No change of venue shall be allowed in any proceeding required under the provision of this Part to be brought before the district court.  The judge may be recused and a judge ad hoc appointed as is now provided by law in civil matters in this state.
